holdings.infoBox: CRAK is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are Valero Energy stock at 8.46%, Reliance Industries Ltd GDR - 144A at 7.56%, Marathon Petroleum at 7.19%, Phillips 66 at 7.11%, and Orlen at 6.49%.

overview.description: The VanEck Oil Refiners ETF (CRAK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS Global Oil Refiners index. The fund tracks a market-cap index of global stocks issued by firms that earn at least 50% of their revenue from oil refining. CRAK was launched on Aug 18, 2015 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: Refiner Stocks Surge on Diesel Price Spike
data.text: Refineries are benefiting from a shift in crude exports. Both Saudi Arabia and Russia have cut their oil production---to prop up oil prices.

data.text: Goldman Sachs is positive on refiners in general, but investors still need to be picky. Marathon Petroleum is one of its Buy-rated stocks.
